open_issues.claim_text: INFPC co-financing of 15-35% is relevant to this product.
open_issues.notes: The Luxembourg co-financing route exists, but public evidence does not prove this exact service qualifies.

open_issues.claim_text: Berlitz is global, Prolingua is local and freelancers do not provide structured tracking.
open_issues.notes: Only the competitor existence and some delivery patterns are supported; the freelancer-tracking claim is not.

open_issues.claim_text: Ministry of Education certified implies INFPC eligibility.
open_issues.notes: The rerun found no public evidence that such certification automatically unlocks INFPC relevance.

open_issues.claim_text: LMS analytics, multilingual delivery and flexible scheduling together create a unique edge.
open_issues.notes: Multilingual delivery and flexible scheduling already appear in public competitor pages; the analytics layer remains unproven.
